title: 2Unrs5W9Vbna7Njjpbkdo4Loy7Xx78
summary:
Main
As we highlighted in several notes last month, China has recently made several unprecedented large purchases of corn from the United States. Overall, any deterioration in US-China relations is not having an impact on China's agricultural purchases. July 10th saw China purchase 1.365 million tons of US corn, which at the time marked China's largest one-day purchase of US corn since 1994.
